programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.desc: While struggling through the wings of death, Hannibal Buress pulls back the curtain on The Eric Andre Show.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Michael B. Jordan Gets Knocked Out By Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Michael B. Jordan has the Midas touch with roles like Erik Killmonger, but can he handle the wings of death?

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Charlize Theron Takes a Rorschach Test While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: As she struggles through the Scoville onslaught, Charlize Theron teaches Sean some South African slang, breaks down her reality-TV obsession and takes the spiciest Rorschach test in history.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Adam Rippon Competes in the Olympics of Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: With millions of Scovilles coursing through his veins, Rippon shares behind-the-scenes stories from PyeongChang, reveals the magical powers of In-N-Out burgers and judges a very special "Hot Ones" free-skate routine from Sean Evans.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Gabriel Iglesias Does Wrestling Trivia While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Fluffy battles the wings of death and discusses his outlandish food adventures, iconic wrestling catchphrases and the keys to getting out of a speeding ticket. Don't be surprised when the scorching sauces bring some other characters out to play.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Philip DeFranco Sets a YouTube Record While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: As they fend off the Scoville onslaught, Sean and Philip get into the weeds of YouTube history, unpackage the problems with contemporary media and reveal photographic evidence of a bygone era when Sean actually had a six-pack.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Trick Daddy Prays for Help While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Find out as the Miami rap legend takes on the wings of death and discusses everything from partying with Jeremy Shockey to hip-hop's enduring love affair with Benihana.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Tyra Banks Cries for Her Mom While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: In between "America's Next Top Model" anecdotes and expert breakdowns of the modeling industry, Ty Ty drops a fire rap verse, critiques Sean Evans' head shots, stress-eats ice cream, strikes hot sauce-inspired poses and so much more.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Alton Brown Rigorously Reviews Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Alton sits down for his date with Sean and the wings of death. As he meticulously reorders the hot sauces to his own ranking, Alton tackles everything from the history of food TV to Eminem lyrics to the art of a bottle of champagne.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Johnny Knoxville Gets Smoked By Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The Jackass alum has been gored by bulls and shot in the chest, but can he survive the wings of death?

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Natalie Portman Pirouettes in Pain While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: As the Scoville bombs rain down on her tongue, Portman discusses her beloved "SNL" rap performances, her Harvard days and why it's cool that Kanye used ballet dancers in his 'Runaway' music video.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Marques Brownlee Ranks Hot Sauce Labels While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: During the spice storm, Marques Brownlee breaks down his pro Ultimate Frisbee career, offers sensible headphone advice and provides some scorching breakfast-cereal takes.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Joel Embiid Trusts the Process While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: As he tries to swat off the Scovilles, Embiid talks about Meek Mill's return to Philly during the Playoffs, meeting Michael Jordan and why he loves dunking on average Joes on the playground.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Joji and Rich Brian Play the Newlywed Game While Eating Spicy Wings

programme.title: 24 Hours on the Reef
programme.desc: The atoll of Fakarava in Polynesia is a true underwater paradise with an extraordinary diversity of wildlife. Frederic's freediving mission here is very ambitious: he wants to investigate the atoll's 24-hour rhythm of life, dive with its residents round the clock and record the reef's sounds. Documenting the atoll's life in this way could bring ground-breaking insights for scientist Prof. Serge Plane and allow him to explore the interrelationships between different reef organisms in unprecedented detail.

programme.title: Goddess of the Night
programme.desc: Is the long-range effect of the moon really as great as popular belief claims? For example, 88 percent of the Germans believe in the lunar influence. The magic of the moon, is it myth or truth? The moon showed the early humans the right time for sowing and harvesting.

programme.title: Child of the Earth
programme.desc: What would people be without the moon? We owe its existence to a cosmic act of love: Scientists assume that the moon originated about 4.5 billion years ago through a collision of a planet with our earth. We all literally carry his DNA in us. But what makes our terrestrial moon so unique? And what do we humans owe to the distant celestial body?

programme.title: The 8th Continent?
programme.desc: Fifty years ago for the first time astronauts in the shape of Neil Armstrong and Edwin "Buzz" Aldrin, put their feet on the lunar surface. But does the rendezvous in space remain the climax in the relationship between man and moon? Or could the moon become our second earth in the future, maybe even the eighth continent?

programme.title: The Silicon Valley Revolution
programme.sub-title: How a few nerds did change the world
programme.desc: The Silicon Valley Revolution - How a few nerds did change the world - From Hippies to the first PC: Todays' Silicon Valley is the home for multi-million dollar IT companies. In the beginning, however, it was unsophisticated, colourful, chaotic, and revolutionary. Hippies and amateur entrepreneurs initiated an unprecedented revolution: the pioneers of the PC wanted to change the world in an attempt to dethrone the “Big Brother”.

programme.title: The Human Limits
programme.desc: The Human Limits - Season 1 - Physical Masters: In this part, the focus is set on four individuals going beyond their physical boundaries. There's freediving world record holder Herbert Nitsch who can hold his breath for more than nine minutes, Wim Hof who likes going for a walk in the Arctic preferably without clothes, human echolocation expert Daniel Kish who can ride a bicycle despite his blindness and Bavarian ice climbing champion Ines Papers.

programme.title: The Story of Europe
programme.desc: The Story of Europe - Commonalities and Division: Europe has been a battle concept for centuries: it often takes foreign enemies to weld the Europeans together. But for centuries, they are primarily fighting against themselves. It was not until the Enlightenment and the French Revolution of 1789 that a new idea of Europe emerged based on common values: freedom, equality and fraternalism.

programme.title: The Disposable Cup
programme.desc: The disposable cup lets us stay on the move. But does multitasking really save us any time in the long run? Is our desire to do more actually costing us time?

programme.title: The Bar Code
programme.desc: The barcode could be considered the fingerprint of high-speed capitalism. Everything they touch just suddenly moves faster. But does this convenience come at a cost?

programme.title: The Dishwasher
programme.desc: In millions of homes around the world today, doing the dishes means loading the dishwasher. But when it comes to time, how do they stack up against hand-washing?

programme.title: The Shopping Mall
programme.desc: The shopping mall didn't only change the way we shop. It changed the way we think about shopping. And for better or worse, they've changed the way we think about time.

programme.title: The Plastic Container
programme.desc: The sealable plastic container has changed the way we shop for food, cook, the way we eat, and where we eat. And it's changed the way we think about our time.

programme.title: The Microwave
programme.desc: Discovered by accident in 1946, the microwave oven revolutionized kitchens and today is one of the most ubiquitous household appliances in the world.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Conspiracy Files looks at some of the secret government warehouses of the United States. It looks at Fort Knox gold depository and asks whether the gold there has been removed. It also examines Hangar 18 at Wright Patterson Air Force base in Ohio and whether it contains crashed alien craft or the Nazi Die Glocke.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Conspiracy Files examines a conspiracy that may be seeking to eradicate 90% of the world's population. It looks at the Georgia Guidestones built by an unknown architect which call for humanity to reduce its population to below 500 million.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Conspiracy Files examines whether the United State military has constructed flying saucers. It looks at unclassified documents describing Project 1794 and a supersonic large disk fighter aircraft. These plans are later developed by a Canadian company Avro Aircraft into the Avrocar.

programme.title: The Power of Plants The Great Escape
programme.desc: You think plants are boring or passive? Far from it! They use complex reactions to respond to light, sound and touch. And like in the animal kingdom, different species have developed a near unending list of strategies to ensure their legacy is passed on. Plants have evolved tricks to beat the ele-ments, animal enemies or even other plants: From thorns and spines to poisons and even live-in bodyguards. This two-part series shows the survival strategies of our green “roommates” we share the planet with.

programme.title: Kanga Pan
programme.desc: Kanga Pan: An African Horror Story is a spine-chilling, one-off wildlife documentary. Who is the killer on the loose? Who is terrorising the pan? An investigation needs to be undertaken.

programme.desc: This episode follows the animals of Argentina, living life at the mercy of the Andean mountains.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Argentina

programme.title: Wild Europe

programme.title: Giants of Fortune
programme.desc: In the little Filipino village of Oslob on the Cebu Island, people suffer from typhoons and overfishing. Until the world's biggest fish and the Internet change everything.Fisherman Zosimo's dearest wish is for his children to graduate from high school one day. Yet the chance that this wish will come true is tiny, since at times Zosimo doesn't even manage to feed the family. Typhoons and overfishing make the lives of Oslob fishermen difficult.

programme.title: The Oceans Seven
programme.desc: André Wiersig, born in 1972, has achieved what no German has ever done before: he has swum through the world's seven most famous straits, the so-called Ocean's Seven. To prepare for it, he chose a familiar but hostile environment. In his carport, he hardened himself in a rain barrel filled with groundwater.

programme.title: Symphony of the Seas
programme.desc: Our journeys take us all around the world from Patagonia to the USA, from Greenland to South Africa and from Cambodia to Australia and leads us to the most fascinating places where landscapes animals and humans are the main focus of our documentaries. Whether on land or at sea – the last paradises of the world are our destination.

programme.title: The Last Paradises: Patagonia
programme.desc: On the wild coast of Patagonia, the nature calendar describes the most diverse visiting times of fascinating animals, from the southern right whale and other large whales, via the sea lions and elephant seals up to the orcas and millions of penguins. The encounters with whales and their babies are spectacular. Hardly anywhere else on earth can one experience both the brutal and the delightful sides of nature so vividly and so close. The trip to the hot spots for animal watchers and researchers leads us inter alia to the Caleta Valdez. This is where, during the mating season, the southern elephant seals bring their babies into the world, mate and enjoy a little sunbathing on the beach.

programme.title: Wild Pacific
programme.desc: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest of Earth's oceanic divisions. It extends from the Arctic Ocean in the north to the Southern Ocean.

programme.title: Secrets of the North Sea
programme.desc: The North Sea is enigmatic. It presents itself in cool shades of grey. Yet who would have guessed that beneath the chilly waves are opulent coral gardens, courting squids, and several of the largest sea creatures on the planet?

programme.title: Mysterious Oceanic Oases
programme.desc: Countless marine animals frolic on the steep slopes of underwater volcanoes. In many cases, several are rare species not found elsewhere. This is in part due to the fact that plankton clings to the wall and provides the fish with food in abundance. This documentary shows several of these oases and also examines the impact dive tourism has and whether preventive measures can help to maintain them. Nature and underwater filmmaker Rolf Möltgen undertakes dives into the mysterious underwater mountain landscapes with marine scientists from all corners of the globe. This journey takes us to Mexico, to snappers, white-tip reef sharks, Galapagos sharks and giant mantas. We visit the Maldives, Colombia and Costa Rica, where the team documents rare species such as deep sea burbots, small tooth sand tiger and dogfish sharks, in depths of more than 3 metres. The eerie underwater mountain world proves: everyone plays a part in the network of life. Thanks to consistent protective regulations, it has been possible to retain the underwater diversity - especially in the unique oases of the high seas

programme.title: Into America's Wild
programme.desc: Step off the beaten path and connect to your inner trailblazer in this cross-country journey to some of the most beautiful but little-known landscapes of North America. Into America's Wild is a non-stop ride via kayak, train, bike, hot air balloon and more that explores the transformational allure of wild places and the human connection we all share with the natural world.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric treks the canyons and waters of Lake Powell, Utah on foot and via packraft.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric leaves the backcountry to discover urban hiking adventures in the cities of Los Angeles and San Francisco, California.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 1
programme.desc: Canadians Sophie and Anna go on a journey of discovery, luck and love in the Cradle of Liberty, Boston, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 2
programme.desc: Gabby and Jono try their luck in panoramic Salt Lake City, Utah.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 3
programme.desc: Percy and Michelle go on a game of chance in the Emerald city of Seattle.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: When you're surrounded by breathtaking mountain landscapes, it would be easy to rely on tradition and stay the same. However, this destination does the exact opposite. Whether it's creating a state-of-the-art museum to honor the United States' greatest athletes, modernizing its natural attractions so they're accessible to all, or creating a community that invites success, there's excitement in the air for what is new and innovative. See why Colorado Springs, Colorado is a Place to Love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: Few places compare to coastal Maine's wild beauty. It's where mountains meet the ocean, marine animals have island retreats, and the air comes perfectly salted. It's known as summer vacationland with a coastline that stretches over 3,400 miles, punctuated with lighthouses, schooners, and fabulous lobster shacks. Throw in a foggy sunrise at Cadillac Mountain and boom—you'll see why Maine has captured so many hearts. Here's why Maine is a place to love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: In St. Augustine, Florida, wandering is encouraged and time is meant to be savored. It's a historic powerhouse of a destination where local events not only shaped its history but an entire country's. With an unexpected food scene, protected wetlands, and miles of beautiful beaches to explore, there's a lot to sink your (shark) teeth into. Join Samantha as she explores America's oldest city – St. Augustine, Florida.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy's digging in to all kinds of meat: out of the smoker, on the grill, and into the fryer when he visits Miami, FL, and Modesto and Stockton, CA.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits joints taking childhood favorites to a gourmet level. A Denver bar cooks up tater tots, pork rinds and a pastrami sandwich. A Tacoma spot turns out pork shoulder tacos, elk sliders and parmesan stuffed tater tots.

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Route 66 is lined with wonderful and informative attractions. Here are just a few of those must-see stops!

programme.title: Destination Route 66

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: A definite highlight in this FIBO edition in Germany, Strongman Champions League introduced its new rules for a special team item. Graham Hicks tries here to set a New World Record on the biggest log in the world, currently held by Krzysztof Radzikowski. Boosted also by the presence of the acclaimed in the strongman circles names of Mark Felix and Danis Zageris.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This weekend sees the Strongman Champions League Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. Big lifting names such as Graham Hicks , Vidas Blekaitis and Vytatus Lalas are in the startlist to push some big numbers.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The battle of the Dutch will take place this edition in Lichtenvoorde, a place very well known in Holland because of the famous “Black Cross”. The athletes will compete over six heavy events and the winner gets 25 Strongman Champions League ranking points.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Set in the beautiful mountain resort Zlatibor, the fifth stage of the Strongman Champions League 2017 sees 14 athletes from across the world competing for the gold medal of SCL Serbia 2017. The event welcomes top-athlete - and odds-on favourite - Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia), who has presented himself in an impressive shape so far. Can his opponents defeat him?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next two stages take place in Quebec. With eight events over two days, SCL Canada is a true ‘heavyweight'. The athletes compete in: Truck Pull, Deadlift with cars, Log Lift, and the Atlas Stones. The World's Strongest Viking Jean-Francois Caron from Canada is a favourite, as well as current SCL leader Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and promising underdog Jimmy Paquet (Canada).

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: One day, Ricky and Tyra were playing with a ball. And right nearby, a pterodactyl mother was teaching her chicks to fly.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Ricky and Tyra love to play together! However, sometimes Tyra cannot keep up with her younger brother's imagination.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: One day during a basketball game, Ricky cheated, and the referee removed him from the field.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Ricky and Boo love to play on the playground. They build knight castles out of building blocks, like, every day. One day Ricky got tired of it and decided to build something more adult-like!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: There is a book fair in DinoCity today! There, you can find the most interesting and exciting books. However, Ricky can't read, and he has no intentions of learning to!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: One day, Ricky and Tyra were playing with a ball. And right nearby, a pterodactyl mother was teaching her chicks to fly.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Ricky and Tyra love to play together! However, sometimes Tyra cannot keep up with her younger brother's imagination.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Ricky dreamed of learning to ride a two-wheeled bike! He wanted to roam all over DinoCity with his friend Boo and hear the wind whistle past his ears!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: The Saur family is off to the amusement park! Everyone's looking forward to a fun day out, only Tyra is preoccupied by something.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Out on the football field one day, Ricky managed to score a goal... with his tail! The supporters went wild. Everyone praised and congratulated Ricky.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Ricky only has to step outside the house and he ends up in a puddle or something equally unpleasant. This time, he's come home dirty with a bump on his forehead and his clothes all torn.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Everyone knows Kraken - he's Ricky and Tyra's pet. Everyone knows that Ricky often comes up with ideas - each more promising than the last! This time, Ricky has decided to train Kraken!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Birthdays are the absolute best. There's no doubt about it: you get gifts, all your wishes are granted, and you even get free ice cream.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Today's an important day! The Saur family is going to get their Christmas tree.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: When you have a sibling, you have to share literally everything! For in a family, almost everything is shared -toys, sweets, and even a pet!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Cousin Sara comes to visit the Saur family. She's travelled half the world and Ricky and Tyra worry that she'll find Dinocity boring.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: At school, the dinosaurs get a homework assignment-to make a presentation about Dinocity. One student decides to present about the town's architecture, and another about its main attractions.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Have you ever tried to combine things that don't go together? For example, eating soup with marshmallows, putting on a dress with a skirt, or playing... figure hockey! This sport really does exist!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Today on the playground everyone is gathered around Fangosaur. And there is a good reason for that - Fangosaur has lost a tooth! And now Dinofairy is exchanging it for money.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: What's the nicest thing in the whole world? That's right-doing a good deed! Tyra turns in caps for recycling and helps the whole world! But what do Ricky and Boo do? They just play on the playground.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Do you know what an ear-hamster is? You've definitely come across one more than once! When you hear some melody or song, and then hum it all day-that's an ear hamster!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: What can be done with things that aren't needed? Give them to someone who needs them. Great idea! All that remains is to find the things that really-really aren't needed.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: One day, Tyra takes Ricky with her on a school field trip to the museum.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Summer is the best! You can chase a ball, run on the grass, play badminton, and bask in the sun. But what is there to do when winter comes? Absolutely nothing! You can't even kick a ball.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Mom Saur grows the tastiest berries in the world. Everyone loves them: Dad Saur, Tyra, Ricky, the pterodactyls... Oh! Those pterodactyls again!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: On some days, things just don't go right. The kind of day that gets off on the wrong foot! Unlucky days. Before, every fifth day was like this for Ricky. But everything is about to change!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: There's quite the commotion in Dinocity! A journalist from a well-known TV program has announced that the person who makes the most interesting report about the life of the city will appear on TV.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Grandpa Saur has always dreamed of some extraordinary adventure! For example, to meet a real space alien! For many years, grandfather has been looking in a telescope in the hopes of spotting an alien.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Did you think invisibility cloaks existed only in fairytales? No way! Boo has his dad's wildlife photography cloak. It lets you camouflage with any environment, so that no one will notice you.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Ricky and Tyra love playing with their dad. But they're already a little tired of Dinopoly, ring-toss, and puzzles. But resourceful Dad Saur has come up with a new game: "The Floor is Lava."

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: One day, Ricky finds a lamp in a pile of old trash. It looks just like a magic lamp with a genie inside! Though no genie actually comes out of it.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: What can be scarier than stories told late at night, in a tent, by the lamplight? When shadows tremble on the wall, and even the sweetest little ghost story sounds seriously scary!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Kraken is the favourite pet of the Saur family! He follows Ricky and Tyra everywhere. This time, Kraken was playing with them in the yard. And then he got lost!

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Today is Good Deeds Day in DinoCity! The townsfolk are planting flowers, feeding homeless pterodactyls, and helping each other. Ricky also decided to do something really kind.

programme.title: DinoCity
programme.desc: Dinosaurs, as you know, can be very different. Some prefer grass others eat meat. Some of them fly, and some do not have wings. And Ricky is the one without wings. If only he could fly at least once!

programme.desc: One day, Ricky, Tyra, and their neighbours, Boo, Tim, and his sister, decided to build sand castles.

programme.title: Numb Chucks
programme.desc: Dilweed and Fungus run afoul of Hooves' newly installed and highly intelligent home security system. Then, Buford reprograms the Chucks' talking Woodchuck Morris doll.

programme.title: Saturday Knight Fever
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters catching a cold means trouble for the NEXO-Knights when he can create an entirely new kind of “snotty” monster. King and Queen Halbert have journeyed to the town of Cleanington to open the brand new Scrubbery Barn at the invitation of Roger the Scrubber (seen in 104.) Meanwhile, the Book of Monsters drags Jestro to Snottingham – one of the coldest places in Knighton where everyone coughs, has a runny nose and is generally under-the-weather. The BOM demands that Jestro feed him a “snotheiser” ball which will probably make him sick. The BOM explains that if he is sick, he may just produce a whole new breed of magical monsters … some that the knights would NEVER expect. The BOM gets sick and starts coughing up phlegm globlins and bloblins. The Knights arrive, alerted to what they think is an attack on the town by Snottingham's mayor, Hack Coughmeier. The sickened, sneezy, snotty monsters infect the knights and, more importantly, the knights' NEXO-Shields. Now their NEXO-Powers are infected. As they try to download something to fight the monsters, they realize the powers they get are off strange, infected versions of their powers. The knights drive Jestro and his snot monsters off and they turn in for the night. And, overnight, they all get sick. Meanwhile, the BOM order a nice, hot lava bath…he'll feel fine by morning. But the knights wake-up with colds and they feel terrible. Ava and Merlok 2.0 thinks it will pass in a day or two…it's just a typical Snottingham cold. Each knight gets sick in their own funny way and their illnesses play right into Jestro and the BOM's hands: they're headed to Cleanington to kidnap the king! The citizens of the ultra-clean city hate the sight of monsters, but then feel caught in between when the sick, sneezy, snotty knights arrive on their Fortrex. The fight goes terribly for the knights. They try to download the Nexo-power “Glorious Griffon” but instead get just feathers. So they improvise and tickle the monsters! Ava finally comes up with a way to use some anti-virus tools on their NEXO-Shields and just as Jestro is about to take the king and queen away, the NEXO-Knights get their normal powers back! They defeat Jestro and save the king and queen.

programme.title: Open Mike Knight
programme.desc: The Book of Betrayal leads Jestro and his Monsters to Funnyton – the funnies town in the kingdom. When they Knights arrive to capture him, they discover (to their shock) that Jestro and the Book of Monsters are now the town's top comedians! Jestro and his monsters are in attack formation moving to pillage the town of Funnyton. But when they arrive, ready to tear into the place, they see that nobody's in town. Then, they hear…laughter?! The entire town is there listening to a stand-up comic JOKES KNIGHTLY. He's hilarious. He commands such power, such attention, and such loyalty. Jestro and the BOM decide they must become funny. They order all kinds of book on comedy from Spamazon: books on parody, irony, insult humor, slapstick, satire, knock-knock jokes, elephant jokes, “my monster is so fat” jokes, etc. They work-up a ventriloquist act with the BOM sitting on Jestro's lap. They start doing their act and, surprisingly, they're funny. They're very funny. The Fortrex arrives and the knights rush out, ready for battle. They fight through a string of monsters just outside the town, but discover they're only working as “bouncers” to keep too many people out of the comedy club. (“Sorry, you guys aren't on the list.”) The knights hear loud laughs and head there. In the club, they discover the town isn't being held hostage, they're in the show voluntarily having a great time. And…Jestro and the BOM are funny. Meanwhile, during the show, Jokes Knightly decides he'll steal the BOM and Jestro's act. During the intermission at the comedy show, Clay comes backstage to talk to Jestro. Maybe, Clay says, this shows that Jestro doesn't have to be bad…he is funny, like Clay always said he was. Meanwhile, Jokes Knightly steals the BOM and Jestro can't find it. He panics. Clay encourages him…go on stage alone, be funny…he can do it! Jestro goes out and is funny on his own he hits all his punchlines, he gets big laughs he starts to see that Clay is right. The BOM sees that Jokes Knightly has a “joke book” that turns out to be the BOOK OF BETRAYAL. That's how Mike Knight has become so funny – by stealing everyone's material! BOM calls in Magmar, who saves him from Mike Knight AND takes the Book of Betrayal. As Jestro comes off-stage to great applause, the BOM tells him they have the Book of Betrayal. The BOM calls in Magmar and his monsters and they start a fight as Clay comes to Jestro's defense and calls on the other Knights for backup. A big battle ensues that destroys the comedy club in Funnyton. The Knights win and drive-off Magmar, the monsters and the BOM. As they retreat, the BOM looks around: “Where's my Jestro?!” Jestro sneaked away during the fight and is in a nearby forest with…the Book of Betrayal.

programme.title: The Fortrex And The Furious
programme.desc: In a massive chase around Knighton, the NEXO-Knights attempt to keep the Book of Betrayal out of the Book of Monster's grip. But the evil book is persistent. Will he get the final piece of his evil puzzle? We finally REVEAL that Jestro has given the Book of Betrayal to…Clay. He tells Clay what it is and how Mike Knight used it. And it seems that the Book of Monsters believed it to be the final ingredient in some ‘Master Plan.” Suddenly, they realize Monsters – led by Magmar and the super-mad Book of Monster – are after them! Clay retreats with Jestro and the Book of Betrayal to rendezvous with the other Knights at the Fortrex. The Fortrex isn't fast enough they'll need their own vehicles. They decide that they need to split up and go in multiple directions to make the monsters expend their resources on a chase. It's a huge chase, being covered like a crazy news event by the Knighton News Network. We see a montage of the monsters stopping and capturing all the Knights vehicles: Aaron, Macy, Lance…finally Axl. However, as they do, they realize that the Knights have used Squirebots in Jestro Fan Jester hats (from the vendor at the comedy club in 108) as decoys. They think Axl has the Book of Betrayal in his BRICK containment unit, but it turns out to be the Ned Knightly Comic from episode 203. The Monsters finally corner Clay, who has the real Jestro and Book of Betrayal in his sword vehicle. Before Clay can protest, Jestro pushes the launch button and fires off Clay in the vehicle's rocket sword. The monsters race off with Jestro, leaving the shocked Clay fearing for his friend. Now, Magmar tells the Book of Monsters, they only need to get BOB. Clay makes his way back to the Fortrex and tells what has happened. They decide they must get to the Redoubt of Ruination in the Lava Lands and try to save Jestro. Meanwhile, we see, INTERCUT, a scene where Merlok 2.0 and the Book of Monsters explain the Books of Evil, how they were created and what the BOM will use them for. Merlok, back in the day, split the evil MONSTRUX into 10 magic books to keep him from ever being a threat. Only, he didn't destroy the books…and now the BOM has them and Monstrux can come back into the world! Meanwhile, the BOM has set up the huge, ceremonial arena at their HQ so they can have the ceremony to bring Monstrux back into the world. Jestro realizes he's been a pawn of the Book of Monsters. Jestro says he'll never get the Book of Betrayal…the Knights have it. In the last scene, we see Clay taking the Book of Betrayal from the Fortrex, climbing into his vehicle and driving towards…the Redoubt of Ruination! Has the Book of Betrayal worked its evil magic on him?!

programme.title: Kingdom Of Heroes
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters, having the final pieces of his evil plan in place, tries to take human form. Can the NEXO-Knights and Merlok 2.0 stop the greatest threat they've ever faced? Or will the kingdom be plunged into darkness…forever. The Redoubt of Ruination readies the final ceremony to call forth MONSTRUX, the arch-necromancer of the past. Clay, holding the Book of Betrayal walks to the gates of the spooky place. Inside, Clay hears strange…singing and music. It's like a twisted Broadway show of some kind. Meanwhile, the Knights all realize Clay is gone and so is the Book of Betrayal. Macy says Clay must be up to something. They have to trust him and, more importantly, they have to find him. At the Redoubt of Ruination the ceremony has already begun! The Book of Monsters wants the final ceremony that calls forth Monstrux to be like a really great show! The BOM then barfs up all the BOOKS OF EVIL into their places around Jestro. He's just missing the BOOK OF BETRAYAL, which Clay has. Clay says he'll trade the book for Jestro. The BOM immediately agrees to the deal and sets Jestro free. Then, Monsters grab-up Clay, restrain him, and put him in Jestro's place on the sacrifice stone. From outside, they're interrupted by the sounds of battle the Knights have arrived on the Fortrex and are attacking the Redoubt of Ruination. In the confusion, Jestro slips away. The BOM lets loose with a powerful protection spell to keep the Knights out as he starts with the ceremony…he's going to bring Monstrux out and remanifest him in Clay's body! Jestro is able to escape the Redoubt and make his way to the Knights, who can't seem to battle their way in. It's a race against time as the Knights try to get in and save Clay. As the Knights get in, they see that the crazy BOM is absorbing all the Books of Evil, one-by-one. He grows BIGGER and BIGGER! Macy calls for NEXO-Power…but it's not enough! The gigantic Book of Monsters sucks down the final book, the Book of Betrayal! He looms over Clay, about to consume him, too, and make him into Monstrux! Suddenly, Robin appears carrying TECHKALIBER…he tosses it to Clay. Just as the huge Book of Monsters falls on Clay, he holds up Techkaliber and Merlok 2.0 is there…his full power in the sword. Clay sticks the sword into the Book of Monster's huge mouth. BOOM! There's a BIG, MAGICAL EXPLOSION! As we cut back inside, we see the Book of Monsters is gone. The Knights release Clay and he thanks them and Jestro for saving him. Jestro thanks them all for saving him and seeing the good in him. WE DISSOLVE TO: The JoustDome. In a final ceremony the King and Queen reward the knights and congratulate them for keeping the kingdom safe. There are speeches, happiness and friendship. And Jestro even does a bit that's funny. At the very end we see a hint of something…Monstrux and the Book of Monsters are still out there.

programme.title: Short Sheeped
programme.desc: Logan's desperation to prove himself leads to his capture by the Nightmare King, which leaves his friends to face the Sheep Week finals alone.

programme.title: The Grim Escape
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers rush to save Logan from the Shadowkeep's dungeon, but the liberators soon become the prisoners in a nightmarish twist of fate.

programme.title: Prophecy Of The Green Ninja, Greatest Battles
programme.desc: So the final puzzle forces ninja to question the true meaning of the Green Ninja Prophecy. Solving the puzzles releases a new peril for the Ninja to face. Will memories of their greatest victories be enough to defeat it?

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Floss Dance
programme.desc: Learn the dance "The Floss" with LEGO Friends and experience the much more fun.

programme.title: Karoake and Music Special
programme.desc: LEGO Friends are having fun with Karaoke and music.

programme.title: Celebrating The Special Day
programme.desc: Here, the girls go on an adventurous balloon ride. Watch how much fun they have.

programme.title: Only One Can Remain
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.” On the island, Lloyd learns his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen. They meet the playfully deceitful ruler who tells them they are in a tournament where ‘Only one can remain'. When they are spoiled by their posh quarters, they are surprised to find the game is already afoot: Last person to find a Jade Blade is out. After an epic battle of elemental powers, Kai steals the last one from Karlof, who is kicked out of the tournament through a trap door leading to the unknown. Later that night, the Ninja go in search for Zane but come across an underground temple where Chen and his Anacondrai Worshippers steal Karlof's power. Is this a fighting tournament, or a ploy to steal everyone's power?

programme.title: Versus
programme.desc: In order find Zane, the Ninja stay in the tournament to get past the first round but Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole. In order to find Zane and get to the bottom of Chen's mysterious plot the Ninja need to stay in the tournament and get past the first round. Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole. Meanwhile, new Titanium Ninja Zane is locked in a dungeon and has a nightmare about a ferocious Ice Dragon. Guided by the voice of Pixal, he embraces his new technology and escapes his cell, only to find Pixal hasn't fared as well. Though she has no body, he inputs her CPU into his, uniting the two. In an attempt to prevent Jay versus Cole, the Ninja enlist the Master of Mind to help, but are unable to prevent the inevitable. In a gladiator battle, Jay and Cole put aside their feud to throw the match --enraging Chen to send Cole down the mysterious trap door. Lastly, Nya sees Zane's beacon is working again and is on the hunt for them.

programme.title: Winds Of Change
programme.desc: Lloyd goes on a solo mission... only it's a trap from a GHOST who's escaped the Cursed Realm. When the Ninja's powers mysteriously disappear, they return to the Tea Farm and are attacked by Lloyd, who is possessed by the spirit of Moro, the Master of Wind! After a harrowing escape on the Bounty, Wu tells the Ninja they weren't his first pupils!Kai promises to watch over Lloyd when Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain– but when Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm, Lloyd goes on a solo mission... only to discover it's a trap from a GHOST who's escaped the Cursed Realm. After the Ninja save a small fishing village, Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain but Kai promises to watch over him. When Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm,

programme.title: Ghost Story
programme.desc: When Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu's staff, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja – and the Ninja discover Wu's staff contained 3 symbols that lead to the Tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master which holds a mysterious relic that could alter the course of Ninjago. Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu's staff, leaving them to crash. When the dust settles, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja. They discover Wu's staff contained 3 symbols that lead to the Tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master which holds a mysterious relic that could alter the course of Ninjago. In order to save Lloyd and get their powers back, they set off to find the first clue – the scroll to the lost martial art of ‘Airjitzu'. On their way to get it, they have a run in with one of Moro's ghost generals Wraythe, and discover water is the key to stopping them. Meanwhile, Nya discovers a family secret – her mother was a Water Ninja and with training, she could be one too.

programme.title: Saturday Knight Fever
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters catching a cold means trouble for the NEXO-Knights when he can create an entirely new kind of “snotty” monster. King and Queen Halbert have journeyed to the town of Cleanington to open the brand new Scrubbery Barn at the invitation of Roger the Scrubber (seen in 104.) Meanwhile, the Book of Monsters drags Jestro to Snottingham – one of the coldest places in Knighton where everyone coughs, has a runny nose and is generally under-the-weather. The BOM demands that Jestro feed him a “snotheiser” ball which will probably make him sick. The BOM explains that if he is sick, he may just produce a whole new breed of magical monsters … some that the knights would NEVER expect. The BOM gets sick and starts coughing up phlegm globlins and bloblins. The Knights arrive, alerted to what they think is an attack on the town by Snottingham's mayor, Hack Coughmeier. The sickened, sneezy, snotty monsters infect the knights and, more importantly, the knights' NEXO-Shields. Now their NEXO-Powers are infected. As they try to download something to fight the monsters, they realize the powers they get are off strange, infected versions of their powers. The knights drive Jestro and his snot monsters off and they turn in for the night. And, overnight, they all get sick. Meanwhile, the BOM order a nice, hot lava bath…he'll feel fine by morning. But the knights wake-up with colds and they feel terrible. Ava and Merlok 2.0 thinks it will pass in a day or two…it's just a typical Snottingham cold. Each knight gets sick in their own funny way and their illnesses play right into Jestro and the BOM's hands: they're headed to Cleanington to kidnap the king! The citizens of the ultra-clean city hate the sight of monsters, but then feel caught in between when the sick, sneezy, snotty knights arrive on their Fortrex. The fight goes terribly for the knights. They try to download the Nexo-power “Glorious Griffon” but instead get just feathers. So they improvise and tickle the monsters! Ava finally comes up with a way to use some anti-virus tools on their NEXO-Shields and just as Jestro is about to take the king and queen away, the NEXO-Knights get their normal powers back! They defeat Jestro and save the king and queen.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus and Jetfire attack the ship, but can't stop the Hydra Cannon being deployed.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Hot Shot insists they should take vengeance on the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With the Autobot ship ready to leave, Hot Shot refuses to let the children accompany them.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Transformers Prime deepens the epic mythology of both the AUTOBOTS and DECEPTICONS.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots investigate the return of the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When a life signal is received from Cliffjumper, the Autobots roll out and are met by newly-returned Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bulkhead is on a mission to rescue Agent Fowler, who has been kidnapped by the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Omega Supreme becomes consumed with a personal vendetta against the Constructicons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons are thrown through space to a strange world.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Four female Autobots come out of hiding to raid a Decepticon base on Cybertron for Energon Cubes.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When the city's hottest nightclub opens up, its patrons mysteriously start aiding the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Earth's most accomplished game hunter has his sights set on a new target: the head of Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: It's Decepticon versus Decepticon when triple changers Astrotrain and Blitzwing decide to seize power.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots and the Elite Guard pursue Wasp for their own agenda.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Traveller: A dragon terrorizes the Village of the Smurfs. To put the dragon to rest, the Smurfs must find the noted Chinese traveler. Fortunately, Papa Smurf is able to understand the strange customs of the stranger, and even to speak a few words.

programme.title: The Man In The Moon
programme.desc: Sick and tired of not being appreciated, the Man in the Moon quits his job and retires on Earth, to the Village of the Smurfs. The absence of a First Quarter Moon wreaks havoc in the customs of the Smurfs, and Mother Nature and Father Time get dragged in...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Pet For Baby Smurf: There is a prize for the cutest pet of a Smurf. Baby Smurf brings a cute, lovely, affectionate Glowing Darling, a pet anybody falls in love with… But this pet is a creation of Gargamel, the evil wizard intent on destroying the Smurfs!

programme.title: Symbols Of Wisdom
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf desperately wants to be more like Papa Smurf. Can a hair tonic be the answer? Can Gargamel be able to finally capture the Smurfs? Does wisdom really reside in a beard?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Gingerbread Smurfs: Brainy feels up to the occasion when he starts the recipe for cookies. He is sure to win the contest: he borrowed a recipe from Papa Smurf's Book of Magic. But a big surprise, and some nasty happenings, await poor Brainy... and the whole Village.

programme.title: Secret Of The Village Well
programme.desc: Why is Clumsy Smurf waiting day and night near the Village well? What is the wish that he wants to be kept secret? How is Gargamel going to be mixed up in this mysterious affair? Is Gargamel going to catch the Smurfs at last?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Float Full Of Smurfs: The Smurfs must find a bunny family to pull their float in the Autumn Carnival. Gargamel sees his chance to capture the little blue people and disguises himself as a giant bunny. Is he going to catch all the Smurfs in one fell swoop?

programme.title: Stop And Smurf The Roses
programme.desc: Wicked Chlorhydris, the sorceress, wants to destroy all love and beauty on Earth. She has to annihilate Wood Elf Grove, where the loving mute elf Laconia cares for the wild flowers. But the Smurfs are there to save the day.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Jokey's Funny Bone: Jealous of the attention Vanity Smurf receives when he breaks his toe, Jokey Smurf feigns sickness in hopes of getting recognition. Unfortunately, his ploy turns against him and instead of loving care all he receives is the proverbial pound of curse.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Stealing Grandpa's Thunder: The nasty Stalker, who traps wild animals and sells them, has Grandpa and Wild in his clutches. Nanny and Smoogle come to the rescue, catching the Stalker in one of his own traps.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurf The Presses: Reporter writes that Gargamel wants to be friends with the Smurfs, after hearing something out of context. Gargamel talks Reporter into taking him to Smurf Village to make his announcement in person. When Gargamel kidnaps the Smurfs, it's up to Reporter to write them out of a tight corner.

programme.title: Bungling Babysitters
programme.desc: While Handy, Brainy, and Greedy argue, Hogatha kidnaps Baby for her Formula for baby-soft skin. It's up to the quarrelling trio, plus Smoogle, to rescue Baby from Hogatha's clutches.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Bigmouth's Roommate: Gargamel throws Scruple out, so he moves in with Bigmouth. When the Smurflings help Bigmouth throw a party, Scruple captures them to get into Gargamel's good graces again. But he doesn't count on Bigmouth coming to the rescue.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Incredible Shrinking Wizard: Gargamel has thrown in his slime pond so much poisonous muck that the water becomes enchanted and Gargamel, after falling in, suddenly finds himself much smaller that he would wish. Actually he is going to be so small that Papa Smurf will save him!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Circus For Baby: It must be a coincidence: just as an elephant crosses the forest and meets baby Smurf, the Smurfs decide to create a big Smurf Circus. They are going to meet the infernal sorcerer Balthazar and Baby Smurf will have a lot of fun...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hopping Cough Smurfs: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurf On Wood: The evil wizard Gargamel once again meets Esmeralda, the gypsy fortune-teller, and she finds a novel way of getting the gold coin that Gargamel imprudently shows her. But the Smurfs in their turn are tricked into believing there is such a thing as a good-luck tree...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Little Orange Horse With Gold Shoes: Sliding down a rainbow, a little winged horse loses a golden shoe. He meets the Smurfette and she helps him look for his lost horseshoe. They fall in love somehow, for who could be unmoved by the charm of a little orange horse... Or of a Smurfette?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Master Smurf: There is an evil power in the Titan's crown that Miner Smurf finds underground. And Greedy Smurf is the Smurf to fall victim to it. Then Gargamel comes up with some new schemes to destroy the Smurfs, and everything gets hopelessly tangled.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Winged Wizard: Determined to fly over Smurf village to catch a Smurf to take to the Wizard's Convention, Gargamel invokes his Book of Spells to help him. A series of funny flying machine mishaps occur and Gargamel is once more the laughing stock of the Wizard's Convention.

programme.title: The First Telesmurf
programme.desc: Papa Smurf pours a magic potion over the new Smurf-melon patch, which instantly grows and grows all over the village and forest. The Smurfs use the blossoms as a telephone, but before Gargamel can trace their voices, the flowers turn into melons and telesmurf is no more.

programme.title: The Rabbids have a great plan.
programme.desc: Four rabbids find a wooden horse and tries to make it move by all means, while drawing Zak's attention.

programme.title: The Rabbids are morons.
programme.desc: In order to get a little, Hibernation Rabbid divides the Junkyard into two separate zones with a border fence.

programme.title: The Rabbids have to be cunning.
programme.desc: After his pals seemingly managed to reach the moon, a rabbid fins himself alone in the junkyard.

programme.title: The Rabbids go to the Moon.
programme.desc: To fight against boredom, the rabbids launch a competition of strange noises.

programme.title: The Rabbids make movies
programme.desc: Hibernation Rabbid decides to shoot a film singing his own praises.

programme.title: The Rabbids travel.
programme.desc: The rabbids have collected several pieces of armor from the knights' castle.

programme.title: The Rabbids are missing!
programme.desc: When a pilot rabbid disappears, a detective rabbid starts to investigate…

programme.title: The Rabbids are having a party.
programme.desc: A rabbid discovers the immense power of music when he puts on some headphones.

programme.title: Rabbids are in the wild.
programme.desc: Hibernation Rabbid gives a Rabbid butler a old pictures of himself, frozen inside an ice cube.

programme.desc: Blasted into the Polar Regions when his secret HQ explodes, Evil Rabbid raises a penguin army!

programme.title: Get Blake
programme.desc: Blake must master playing a wooden fish for a battle-of-the-bands performance with Skye. Followed by Sixty Second Dennis.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The adventures of Dennis, his dog Gnasher, and their best friends JJ, Rubi and Pieface. The team cause havoc to Walter, Beanotown and Bash Street School, where all the rules go out the window.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher: Stunt Gran
programme.desc: Walter shows off some new tricks on his fancy skateboard, prompting Dennis to make a jibe that even his Gran could do tricks like that with such a high-tech boar and the bet is on! However, Walter secretly sabotages the trick, causing Gran to hang up her menacing shoes as a matter of public safety. It's up to Dennis, Gnasher and Angel Face to expose the truth and get Gran back to her wily self. Followed by more Dennis episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: When I Was Your Age
programme.desc: Paul, 10, is a typical little boy. Except that as soon as someone tells him When I was your age, he is immediately hurled back to the time when the person he is talking to was 10 too.

programme.title: When I Was Your Age
programme.desc: Paul, 10, is a typical little boy. Except that as soon as someone tells him When I was your age, he is immediately hurled back to the time when the person he is talking to was 10 too.

programme.title: The Amazing Spiez
programme.desc: Megan is teased by her brothers because she is a poor skateboarder. Then they are called for a mission to investigate strange occurrences in Dubai, involving buildings and other structures breaking down. Later, Megan goes missing after getting her new skateboard that she will use to show her brothers that she can skate. Lee, Marc and Tony find her with an army of skateboarders responsible for breaking down the buildings so they can create skateparks for themselves.

programme.title: The Amazing Spiez
programme.desc: The Spiez are sent to protect a famous TV spy actor from various incidents. To keep an eye on him, the Spiez are invited to be in his Spy show, with the guidance of their parents who think they won a contest. The actor is kidnapped and the Spiez rescue him.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: With one backstage pass for a Ratbucket gig, Dennis and his friends pass themselves off as Ratbucket, only for the real Ratbucket not to be able to play at his own concert. Followed by 60 second Dennis and 'Bad Dad'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Believing Gnasher and Gnipper to be trapped in Beanotown Dog Pound, Dennis comes up with a plan to rescue his friends and bring them both home. Followed by more Dennis and Gnasher episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: When Dennis breaks his skateboard again, Dad agrees to buy Dennis the best skateboard there is as a replacement if he is able to win a prize at the upcoming school award ceremony. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dance of the Seven Pies'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis tries to get a birthday present by saying thank you to his relatives. However, because of Dennis' naughty personality, they take his attempts in a negative way. Followed by 'Dennis Hiccups'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Masters of the House'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After a wrestling accident, Gnasher swallows a canister of laughing gas at the vet's. Dennis, along with Gnasher hide in the conference centre, where dad gives a speech. However, the canister leaks, causing Gnasher to fart laughing gas and having everyone laughing. Followed by 'Attack of the Walterbot'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and Co. have to control Pie Face's obsession with pies during the Pie Festival. Otherwise, they will be grounded. Followed by 'Great Outdoors'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: On a school trip, Dennis finds out that he is descentant to a warrior tribe. He also discovers that Montanna Smith (a famous Indiana Jones-esque explorer and one of Walter's personal heroes) is actually a thief who's trying to steal the treasure of Dennis' ancestor. Will he be stopped before he gets his hands on the treasure? Followed by Dog Tired.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.sub-title: Super Special Sonic Search and Smash Squad
programme.desc: Sonic outsmarts Coconuts, then stumbles into a Convention of Bounty Hunter Robots where Robotnik puts a price on his head. After Sonic defeats all the Robot Bounty Hunters, Robotnik creates Scratch and Grounder to be his S.S.S.S.S. Squad.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Coconuts is exiled by Robotnik to a remote jungle, where he uses a giant baby ape to destroy villages. But Sonic exposes Coconuts as a robot, and the baby ape's real Dad takes Coconuts and the baby ape away for a spanking.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic turns detective to solve the mystery of his missing Red Sneakers--and just in time to get them back and stop Dr. Robotnik's latest attack on a peaceful Mobius village.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outerspace to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Scratch and Grounder fiddle with Robotnik's Warpinating Warpifier and send Sonic and Tails into the world of a Mobius Fairy Tales book.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails adopts a cute and fuzzy pet named Walter who turns out to be a black hole who sucks up everything in Mobius. Realizing that Walter is from another dimension our heroes have to return him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Wes Weasley returns to the Fortress, Coconuts tricks Robotnik into signing an IOU so he can buy thousands of Mobiums worth of magic tricks to use on Sonic. In the end, Sonic goes free, and Robotnik is forced to pay Wes the massive IOU debt.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and the Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's lab in hopes of deciphering his roboti-sizer system. While underground, Sonic spots his now roboti-sized Uncle Chuck aboard a Badlands bound mine-train and devises a plan for his rescue.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails brings a new friend home to Knothole - a baby Terra-Pod who has strayed from the herd that is currently migrating. Sonic, Sally, and some of the other Freedom Fighters return the Baby-T to its mom and the rest of the herd.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Dulcy exhibits strange behavior, Sally discovers she's going through a "rites of passage" stage of her adolescence. In Dragon tradition, she is drawn to Dragon Lair, a migratory nesting ground, through trance-like visits from her mother.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic and The Freedom Fighters take out Robotnik's main computer, they're trapped by Swat-Bots in an underground tunnel, only to be rescued by a handsome teenager named Griff. Griff takes them deep beneath the Big City.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Antoine decides to study martial arts but after he wrecks most of Knothole Sonic sends him off to practice in the woods. //Tails begins his training to become a real Freedom Fighter by learning tracking skills while on a camping trip.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Blast to the Past Part I
programme.desc: Sonic attempts a solo rescue to prevent prisoners from being roboti-sized and is hit by a Memory Scrambler that erases short-term memory.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country The Curse of Kongo Bongo
programme.desc: Everyone in the island receives a mysterious letter. Donkey Kong and Diddy discovers that Kongo Bongo Island is coming to an end which these letters contain a curse that causes the Crystal Coconut to stop working, and could eventually destroy the island.

programme.title: SONIC X Little Chao Lost
programme.desc: Sonic and his friends are at a camp site where they discover a Chao colony. Meanwhile, Dr. Eggman is also hiking nearby and decides to launch an attack when he encounters Sonic.

programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Speed
programme.desc: Krusha gets highly intelligent after being run over by a minecart and turns into the leader of the Kremlings. When Diddy and Dixie are trapped in a runaway mine cart with no brakes, it's up to Donkey Kong and Candy to rescue them.

programme.title: SONIC X Emerald Anniversary
programme.desc: Chris' father Nelson purchases a ring made from a Chaos Emerald for his wife Lindsey. Being made aware of its presence, Dr. Eggman attempts to snatch the emerald away from them.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country The Curse of Kongo Bongo

programme.title: A Grand Invitation
programme.desc: Mr Bean is all at sea with the landed gentry.

programme.title: A Royal Makeover
programme.desc: Mr Bean redecorates his room, making it fit for a Queen.

programme.title: SuperMarrow
programme.desc: Mr Bean gets green eyes and green fingers.

programme.title: Bean in Love
programme.desc: Mr Bean becomes smitten with a beautiful singer.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Mr Bean meets a soul mate.

programme.title: Home Movie
programme.desc: Mr. Bean attempts to make his own home movie – a horror thriller with Mrs. Wicket as the star!

programme.title: Fish Sitting
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has to look after Mrs. Wicket's goldfish.

programme.title: The Cruise
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wins two tickets for an exotic cruise and takes Teddy along for the trip of a lifetime.

programme.title: Coconut Shy
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has to buy a cup for Teddy, but he has no money.

programme.title: Green Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean's electricity is cut off so he decides to build a wind turbine.

programme.title: Cash Machine
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to buy a cupcake, but his wallet is empty, so he has to visit a cash dispenser.

programme.title: Litterbugs
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is furious with the untidy state of the streets so he goes on a one-man mission to clean up the town.

programme.title: Rat Trap
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has to deal with an unwanted house guest but the stubborn rat refuses to leave.

programme.title: Valentine's Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean tries to be romantic, but his idea of what that means is different to Irma's.

programme.title: All You Can Eat
programme.desc: Irma is coming for dinner, but Mr. Bean has forgotten about it and so doesn't have anything to cook.

programme.title: Flat Pack
programme.desc: Mr. Bean's bookcase collapses, so he buys a new one in the hardware store.

programme.title: Holiday For Teddy
programme.desc: Mr. Bean takes Teddy on holiday to the seaside.

programme.title: The Newspaper
programme.desc: Every time Bean goes to collect the newspaper from the letterbox, it disappears.

programme.title: Viral Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to read his book but gets interrupted by too much noise.

programme.title: Super Sky
programme.desc: Fascinated by the super spy show, Mr. Bean decides to become a super spy himself. When he becomes suspicious of the Bruisers planning something, he starts to follow them. Later, he notices that the Bruisers are putting an old lady into a van.

programme.title: Scout Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes a Scoutmaster for the day.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When there's no milk for his tea and for Teddy, Mr. Bean goes to buy some.

programme.title: Lord Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is in the library to draw the family tree of kings.

programme.title: Car Wars
programme.desc: The mystery driver of the Reliant Supervan becomes obsessed with revenge.

programme.title: Wedding Day
programme.desc: A wedding car crashes, resulting in Bean coming to the rescue and offering the bride a lift.

programme.title: Bean Phone
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants a smartphone but does not have enough money to buy one.

programme.title: Hotel Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has some unexpected guests who think he runs a hotel!

programme.title: Jurassic Bean
programme.desc: While Mr. Bean is taking photos of wildlife, he sees big footprints belonging to a dinosaur.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: As Max prepares to face Kai in the next round, the members of BBA Revolution overhear a confrontation between Johnny and Robert of the Majestics and Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution are slated to face the sneaky Barthez Battalion, but while Hilary and Kenny want to report their dirty deeds to the authorities, Tyson believes the best way to teach them a lesson is to beat them fair and square...But that's before he really sees how low the team will sink to win.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Our heroes land in Egypt for the next leg of the tournament where the first two teams going up against each other are the Blitzkrieg Boys against the Barthez Battalion. But as Barthez readies his team, we learn he's devised a special spider web-like tape that is supposed to shoot out of his team's blades and trap their opponents in an inescapable web.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Max is having trouble convincing Rick that he is truly dedicated to the PPB All Starz. Max just wants to play for love of the game but Rick thinks he should do anything to win. When the competition continues Max demands they fight a "pairs" match so that he and Rick are forced to work as a team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has just returned back from the World Championships with another victory and he's decided to teach a class of boys in the neighborhood the fine art of blading.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has his hands full when he's confronted by a tough little Blader named Daichi. Just as they're about to battle another mysterious Blader named Jin shows up and wants to challenge Tyson as well. All three Bladers mix it up but Ray puts a stop to the fight when he realizes that Tyson can't handle two Bladers at once.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Daichi continues to annoy Tyson with his constant battle challenges, which Tyson refuses to give in to - even after an embarrassing confrontation at the public swimming pool proves that Daichi is an impressive and highly skilled Beyblader.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson's alone and picking up the pieces of what used to be The Bladebreakers... Daichi won't leave him alone, and Kai is...well, Kai...at least he's got the championships to look forward too, right? Meanwhile, both Ray and Max are going through the growing pains of being part of a new team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: At the preliminaries for the World Championships, Daichi wins his matches easily, establishing himself as a new powerhouse on the Beyblading scene. Kenny also competes, defeating his opponents with such skill that even Tyson is impressed.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: There's only one round left in the tournament to decide who's going to partner up with Tyson in the World Beyblade Tag Team Championships and it's between Daichi and Kai.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Block A and Block B finals of the Beyblade World Championships are underway. Max wins his match and finds himself partnered with a real bully of a blader named Rick.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution Team heads to a remote training camp to prepare for the upcoming tournament. When they first arrive, Hiro tells Tyson that Kai has quit the team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution team fly to New York City for the Beyblade World Championships. The normally feisty Daichi proves to be afraid of flying, and once in the city, he becomes overwhelmed by the size and scope of things in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The teams have been selected and the finals are about to begin...Unfortunately Tyson finds himself facing all of his former friends...each part of a team that he will eventually have to 'blade against.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson blames his embarrassing loss to Ray on Daichi, telling the team he's better off competing alone. As Tyson runs away, the US Finals continue with Rick of the PPB All Starz against Claude of Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Beyblade World Tag Team Championships are about to start in Rome as Barthez busily prepares his team for the big event. He's even invited a television news crew to document his efforts as a coach.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson gets in a huff and leaves the team after he is dropped from the lineup against the Blitzkrieg Boys. This leaves Kenny and Daichi to pick up the slack against their opponents.

programme.title: Bernard

The character does not speak, but expresses himself with gestures and noises.
